key_insights.insight: Nitric oxide deficiency is the earliest event in the onset and progression of age-related chronic diseases.
key_insights.quote: The loss of nitric oxide production is the earliest event in the onset progression of age-related chronic disease.

key_insights.insight: Erectile dysfunction is often the first sign of nitric oxide deficiency and can be an early indicator of cardiovascular disease.
key_insights.quote: The first sign and symptom of nitric oxide deficiency is usually erectile dysfunction...now it's recognized that it's a symptom of loss of nitric oxide and really an accelerated form of cardiovascular disease.

key_insights.insight: Many common blood pressure medications don't target nitric oxide production, which is why they are ineffective for a significant portion of patients.
key_insights.quote: 50% of the people that are given prescription medications to treat their blood pressure do not respond with better blood pressure...because most of the drugs out there aren't targeted toward restoration of nitric oxide.

key_insights.insight: The oral microbiome plays a crucial role in converting dietary nitrate into nitric oxide, and disrupting it can lead to elevated blood pressure.
key_insights.quote: If you eradicate the bacteria, within seven days your blood pressure goes up.

key_insights.insight: Fluoride, a common ingredient in toothpaste and mouthwash, is an antiseptic that disrupts the oral microbiome and is a neurotoxin, thyroid toxicant and chemical toxicant.
key_insights.quote: Fluoride, there's no benefit of fluoride and it's all risk. It lowers IQ in kids by as much as seven points. And it shuts down your thyroid function. And it's a neurotoxin.

key_insights.insight: Mouthwash can negate the cardiovascular benefits of exercise by killing the oral bacteria needed for nitric oxide production.
key_insights.quote: If you do that and you're using mouthwash, you no longer get the benefits from exercise.

key_insights.insight: Nitric oxide is essential for stem cell mobilization, telomere maintenance, and mitochondrial function, all of which are critical for longevity.
key_insights.quote: Nitric oxide is the foundational longevity molecule because nitric oxide is the signal in the body that tells our stem cells to mobilize and differentiate...Nitric oxide activates the enzyme telomerase, which prevents telomere shortening...nitric oxide is the signal in the cell that tells the cell, I need more mitochondria...

key_insights.insight: Sugar disrupts nitric oxide production by binding to and impairing the enzyme responsible for its synthesis and destroying the oral microbiome.
key_insights.quote: Sugar is an absolute poison and it kills many enzymes and binds to everything... the sugar destroys the oral microbiome and completely changes the ecology of the bacteria and completely shuts down nitric oxide production.

key_insights.insight: Nasal breathing activates nitric oxide production in the sinuses, improving oxygen uptake and lowering blood pressure.
key_insights.quote: When we do nasal breathing, it's activating the enzyme to make nitric oxide...we're improving oxygen uptake, oxygen delivery, and that's why nasal breathing and deep breathing has been shown to lower blood pressure.

actionable_advice.how_to: Purchase toothpaste that does not list fluoride as an active ingredient
Till the back of the tongue, and pull forward. Preferably use a copper tongue scraper before brushing. But do NOT use mouthwash afterward!
Consciously breathe through your nose throughout the day, especially during exercise. Consider mouth taping at night, after dental consult to ensure open airways
Spend 20-30 minutes in sunlight daily, without sunscreen, if possible. Consider using red light therapy.

actionable_advice.advice: Eliminate or significantly reduce sugar intake
actionable_advice.how_to: Monitor blood glucose levels after meals to identify foods that cause spikes and avoid them. Focus on a balanced diet with high-quality protein, healthy fats, and minimal carbohydrates.

memorable_stories: Dr. Bryan's experience of healing his father's non-healing wound with topical nitric oxide.
Dr. Bryan being inspired by Nobel Laureate Lou Ignarro's statement about nitric oxide's potential to change the world.
contrarian_claims: Fluoride in toothpaste and water is harmful and has no benefits
Antiseptic mouthwash is detrimental to health
Modern medicine is a for-profit business that isn't focused on curing disease
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - The Silenced Scientist: The Cure For Alzheimer's Already Exists?! Doctors Are Trapped In A Broken System! The Link Between Oral Infection & Cancer!
